seo.title: Sign PDF Online Free | No Login & 100% Private
seo.description: Sign PDF online for free in your browser. No signup, no server uploads. Fast, secure and private e-signatures with AssinarPDF.
seo.ogTitle: Sign PDF Online Free — Fast, Secure & No Login
seo.ogDescription: Add your signature to any PDF right in the browser. 100% local processing: your files never leave your device.

howTo.title: How to sign a PDF online for free
howTo.description: With AssinarPDF you sign PDF documents in your browser — no software to install and no cloud uploads. Follow these 4 steps:

step1.title: Upload the PDF:
step1.description: Drag and drop your file into the area above, or click to select it.

step2.title: Create your signature:
step2.description: Draw with mouse or touch, or type your name to generate a signature.

step3.title: Position on the document:
step3.description: Drag the signature to the right place on any page of the PDF.

step4.title: Download the signed PDF:
step4.description: Click "Download Signed PDF" and save the file to your device instantly.

privacy.title: Total privacy
privacy.description: Your files never leave your computer. All processing happens locally in the browser — zero uploads.

noSignup.title: No registration
noSignup.description: We don't ask for email, login, or a credit card. Open, sign, and download. Done.

fast.title: Fast & lightweight
fast.description: Built to work instantly, even on slower connections or mobile networks.

compatibility.title: Works everywhere
compatibility.description: Chrome, Edge, Firefox, and Safari — on desktop or mobile, with nothing to install.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about signing PDFs

free.question: Is AssinarPDF really free?
free.answer: Yes. You can sign PDFs online 100% free for personal and professional use — no signup and no credit card.

saved.question: Are my documents saved on your servers?
saved.answer: No. Our local-first approach means the file is never sent to our servers. The PDF is processed in your browser memory and discarded when you close the page.

install.question: Do I need to install any software?
install.answer: No. AssinarPDF runs entirely in the browser. Just open the site, load your PDF, sign, and download — no installs or extensions.

mobile.question: Can I sign a PDF on my phone?
mobile.answer: Yes. The tool is responsive and works on smartphones and tablets. You can draw your signature with your finger on a touch screen.

legal.question: Is the signature legally valid?
legal.answer: AssinarPDF creates a visual electronic signature on the PDF (an image of your signature). That covers many everyday workflows (internal contracts, receipts, authorizations). For acts that require a qualified digital certificate (e.g. ICP-Brasil in Brazil), use a certificate-based solution.

size.question: What is the maximum file size?
size.answer: You can upload PDFs up to 50 MB. Larger files may take longer to render because all processing happens on your device.

upload.title: Upload your document
upload.description: Your files are processed locally and never leave your device.

PrivacyBadge.title: Privacy Guaranteed
PrivacyBadge.description: Your documents are never sent to any server. All processing happens in your browser memory.

SignatureModal.title: Create Signature
SignatureModal.description: Choose how you want to sign the document.

Footer.tagline: Sign PDFs online for free, with total privacy and no signup. 100% browser-side processing.
Footer.privacy: Your documents are never uploaded to our servers.
